name: Lightdash
description: Lightdash — Data Integration / ETL / Reverse ETL tool for developers. Specializes in Data Visualization.

seo.title: Lightdash Review 2026: Pricing, Alternatives & Lock-in Score
seo.meta_description: Complete Lightdash analysis: pricing, lock-in risk, migration difficulty. Compare with alternatives in Data Integration / ETL / Reverse ETL.

review.verdict: Lightdash is a Data Integration / ETL / Reverse ETL tool.
pros: Pre-built connectors eliminate custom pipeline work
cons: Row or event-based pricing grows with data volume
review.best_for: Data teams centralizing sources into a warehouse
review.not_for: Projects with a single data source and no analytics needs

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Free / hobby tier; no peak-lock evidence.
